objective: Western companies (HQ in North America/Europe/Oceania) that a Saudi or UAE sovereign wealth fund (PIF, Sanabil, Mubadala, ADIA, ADQ, or their direct subsidiaries) invested in, signed an MOU with, or announced economic cooperation with between 2026-06-08 and 2026-07-08

hard_criteria.text: Global HQ in North America, Europe, or Oceania.

A publicly announced investment, MOU, joint venture, or economic-cooperation agreement with a Saudi or UAE sovereign wealth fund (PIF, Sanabil, Mubadala, ADIA, ADQ, or a direct subsidiary), dated between 2026-06-08 and 2026-07-08 — an actual dated announcement, not rumor or 'in talks'.

soft_criteria.text: Size/firmness of the cooperation: a closed investment with disclosed amount > JV > signed MOU > vague cooperation statement.

columns.desc: 'investment' / 'MOU' / 'joint venture' / 'other cooperation' — do NOT inflate an MOU into an investment
which fund: PIF, Sanabil, Mubadala, ADIA, ADQ, or subsidiary name
disclosed amount in millions USD; null if undisclosed
company's current annual revenue in millions USD; null unless publicly reported — private-company revenue is usually unverifiable, never guess

segments.label: fund_announcements
segments.focus: Official announcements and press pages of PIF, Sanabil, Mubadala, ADIA, and ADQ in the window, plus their portfolio-news coverage.

segments.label: gulf_biz_press
segments.focus: Gulf business press in the window — Zawya, Arabian Business, Arab News, The National — SWF investment and MOU announcements involving Western companies.

segments.label: western_financial_press
segments.focus: Reuters, Bloomberg, FT, WSJ coverage in the window of PIF/Mubadala/ADIA/ADQ/Sanabil deals with North American, European, or Oceanian companies.

segments.label: wire_services
segments.focus: PR Newswire, Business Wire, GlobeNewswire releases in the window announcing investments, MOUs, or partnerships with Saudi or UAE sovereign wealth funds.
